programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is determined to actually win a locker for once in Santa Ana and has to show restraint to do it; Rene spots a stack of items in a locker that speaks to him; Kenny puts his needs out to the universe; Barry struggles to stay in the game.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell suffers from bidder indecision; Barry's good-luck charm yields a reward; Jarrod and Brandi win big by going small.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa channels her grandmother, in trying to turn a profit; Brandi is dealing with the most frustrating day ever; Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker; Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers speak to her; Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant; Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary's unit brings out her inner voice; Kenny attempts to clothe America; Brandi and Jarrod get a leg up on the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: After the First 48

programme.title: After the First 48

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old boy is murdered after getting in over his head, detectives hope a Snapchat message can lead them to his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a Tulsa man returns home from jail to find another man with the mother of his children, he is shot and killed in the middle of the street.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a 20-year-old woman is found in her apartment a day after being brutally stabbed over 40 times. In Mobile, dozens of bullets are fired at a busy intersection leaving two men dead in a crashed car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.title: Predator Hunters

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects, before they strike again.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
